title: Free Space Management Strategies
description: A flowchart illustrating the process and key strategies an operating system uses to manage free space on secondary storage, including allocation and deallocation logic.
relationships: A 'New File Creation Request' triggers the 'OS Free Space Manager' to search its structures ('Bit Vector', 'Linked List', 'Grouping', 'Counting') to find and 'Allocate Block(s)'
A 'File Deletion Request' triggers the 'OS Free Space Manager' to return the 'Free Block(s)' to its management structures ('Bit Vector', 'Linked List', 'Grouping', 'Counting')
